channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: OpenAI Foundation outlines $1 billion push, expands leadership team
item.description: OpenAI has committed at least $1 billion over the next year as part of recapitalisation efforts for its Foundation. The investment is aimed at using artificial intelligence (AI) to solve “humanity’s hardest problems.” [Intel, OpenAI]

item.title: Nvidia (NVDA) Stock Slips Modestly to Around $174 in Early Trading as AI Demand Outlook Remains Robust
item.description: Nvidia Corp. shares dipped about 0.6% to around $174.50 in midday trading Tuesday, March 24, 2026, giving back a portion of the previous session's gains as investors digested ongoing momentum in artificial intelligence infrastructure spending despite broader … [Intel, Nvidia]

item.title: The race to control AI infrastructure is on, and SUSE is going all in on open cloud-native power
item.description: As enterprises move toward cloud-native architectures and AI-driven operations, the fight for control is intensifying. But as complexity surges, can open infrastructure restore order fast enough? The modernization push is arriving amid near-universal Kubernet… [Uber]

item.title: Arm Is Now Making Its Own Chips
item.description: The chip design firm says Meta, OpenAI, Cerebras, and Cloudflare are among the first customers of its new artificial intelligence hardware. [Meta, Intel, OpenAI, ServiceNow]

item.title: Meta partners with Arm to develop new CPUs for AI deployments
item.description: Meta and Arm unveil a new data center CPU built for AI workloads as Meta expands its custom silicon stack and gigawatt scale infrastructure. The post Meta partners with Arm to develop new CPUs for AI deployments appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Meta]

item.title: Alphabet Inc. Stock: Shares Slide More Than 1.5% in Early Trading as Tech Sector Faces Geopolitical Pressure
item.description: Alphabet Inc. shares fell more than 1.5% in early trading Tuesday, March 24, 2026, as investors weighed ongoing uncertainty from the U.S.-Iran conflict and broader concerns about elevated energy costs impacting artificial intelligence infrastructure spending. [Alphabet, Intel]

item.title: Deploy SageMaker AI inference endpoints with set GPU capacity using training plans
item.description: In this post, we walk through how to search for available p-family GPU capacity, create a training plan reservation for inference, and deploy a SageMaker AI inference endpoint on that reserved capacity. We follow a data scientist's journey as they reserve cap…
